steps.title: Set up the conditional probability
steps.content: We need the fraction of all 2010 internship students who were from Valley: $\frac{\text{Valley 2010}}{\text{Total 2010}}$

steps.title: Read the values and calculate
steps.content: From the 2010 column: Valley had 65 and total was 140. So the fraction is $\frac{65}{140}$. This matches choice B — B is correct.
